productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Bio Str Casual Shoes
description: Get ready to go out and explore the great outdoors with these Receptor floaters from adidas. Designed for comfort, they look great when teamed with cargo shorts and tees. Upper Synthetic leather uppers with straps around ankle and forefoot Velcro strap closures on the forefoot and ankle for snug Fit Slightly padded panels on the sides, collar and side of the foot Embossed logo name on the forefoot and behind collar Pull loop on the ankle strap Foam footbed with elevated ridge patterns for stimulation of the sole and all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with plus-shaped lugs for enabling natural motion of the feet Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
